arts.ttl: Haaland fires Man City ahead to end recent barren spell
arts.sum: Man City's Mateo Kovacic finds Erling Haaland, who is initially denied by Verbruggen, but follows up to score from close range.

arts.ttl: Brighton set €50m asking price for South America star wanted by Tottenham
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur have set their sights on the move in 2025 for Argentine playmaker Facundo Buonanotte, who is enjoy a fine start to the Premier League season with Leicester City. The 19-year-old, who is currently on loan at the King Power Stadium from Brighton and Hove Albion, has three goals and two assists in nine […] The post Brighton set €50m asking price for South America star wanted by Tottenham appeared first on CaughtOffside.
